title: Mystical Flames
description: The Mystical Flames mod is a Minecraft mod that adds a variety of dragons and mythical beasts for you to tame, train, and discover for yourself.
body:
# THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB TO RUN!
# [CLICK HERE TO DOWNLOAD!](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
![Mystical Flames Logo](https://i.imgur.com/JaCkNqh.png)
![Copyrights](https://i.gyazo.com/593efe4c052629e67840a3eac644c23d.png)
## About the Mod
*Mystical Flames* is a *Minecraft* mod that adds a variety of dragons and mythical beasts for you to tame, train, and discover for yourself. Tame a devastating wyvern, train a graceful phoenix, defend dragon-kind from the foul dragon hunters, soar through the world on the back of your faithful companion... Your Adventure Awaits!!

Currently, our mod adds:
- 8 Custom Dragon Species; Gem, Dramon, Kelptolux, Hydroptera, Lycan, Phoenix, Queen's Crown, and Eternal Flame!

## FAQ
- *"What version is the mod on?"*  The mod is on Forge 1.18.2.
- *"How do I install the mod?"* Please watch this video.
- *"How do I tame ...?"* Please refer to the Wiki.
- *"Will you downgrade to x version?"* Please refer to Disclaimer.
- *"Aren't the Hydroptera, Lycan, and Phoniex all already in DragonFire and isn't it illegal to copy someone else's work?"* Yes, those dragons are in fact from DragonFire, but DragonFire wasn't the one who made those dragons as they were products of the dragon competition thus meaning that while they own the models they don't own the ideas. Those ideas belong to the original owners and in the case of the dragons listed above we already got permission from MidnightPony and ShadowRogue to add those dragons into our mod. ShadowRogue is also helping to produce the mod, so if you want you can also thank her as she might have been involved with getting your dragon into the mod.


## Permissions
- We give you permission to use Mystical Flames in any modpack/server that doesn't cost money to play on, you are allowed to use this in conjunction with other mods, but if there is a bug between our mod and another mod please let us know right away! Please credit MythiGem, and the rest of the Mystical Creations Team somewhere in your modpack's description, and/or list of mods.
- We DON'T give permission to anyone under any circumstances, distribute, sell for any currency of any kind, re-name or re-upload/re-distribute "dead" versions.


## Disclaimer
This mod will not be backported to any version (such as 1.7.10, 1.10.2, 1.12.2, 1.14.4, 1.15.2, 1.16.5, or any other version) DO NOT ASK!
